source_section.title_label_raw: General Built Form and Siting Requirements for Heritage Conservation Districts Construction, Additions, Renovations, or Conservation within Heritage Conservation Districts

sections.title_label_raw: Form and Siting Requirements for Heritage Conservation Districts Construction, Additions, Renovations, or Conservation within Heritage Conservation Districts

provisions.heading_context_raw: Form and Siting Requirements for Heritage Conservation Districts Construction, Additions, Renovations, or Conservation within Heritage Conservation Districts
provisions.text: Within a heritage conservation district, any new construction, addition, or renovation on a property, and any conservation of a building, shall meet the applicable built form and siting requirements of this Chapter.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Form and Siting Requirements for Heritage Conservation Districts Construction, Additions, Renovations, or Conservation within Heritage Conservation Districts
provisions.text: Nothing in this By-law restricts or otherwise limits the requirement to comply with a heritage conservation district by- law, By-law H-200 Heritage Property By-law, and the Heritage Property Act. Pedways

sections.title_label_raw: Pedways are prohibited in heritage conservation districts.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedways are prohibited in heritage conservation districts.
provisions.text: Pedways are prohibited in heritage conservation districts. Drive-Throughs

sections.title_label_raw: Drive-throughs are prohibited in heritage conservation districts.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Drive-throughs are prohibited in heritage conservation districts.
provisions.text: Drive-throughs are prohibited in heritage conservation districts. Permitted Encroachments into Setbacks, Stepbacks, and Separation Distances

sections.title_label_raw: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for
provisions.text: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for any main building shall be open and unobstructed except for the following:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for
provisions.text: patios that are less than 0.6 metre in height and access ramps are permitted in any required setback, stepback, or separation distance;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for
provisions.text: walkways, lifting devices, uncovered steps, and staircases are permitted in any required setback, stepback, or separation distance;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for
provisions.text: sills, eaves, gutters, downspouts, cornices, chimneys, fireplace and stove bump outs, and other similar features may project into any required setback, stepback, or separation distance by no more than 0.6 metre; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any setback, stepback, or separation distance required in this Part for
provisions.text: window bays and solar collectors may project into any required setback, stepback, or separation distance by no more than 1.0 metre. Encroachments into Streets

sections.title_label_raw: Encroachments into streets shall meet the requirements of the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Encroachments into streets shall meet the requirements of the
provisions.text: Encroachments into streets shall meet the requirements of the applicable HRM By-law.
